team_name: TenderMind AI — Intelligent Procurement Evaluation Platform
summary: Design a technical platform for government procurement officers to evaluate tenders and bidder eligibility using AI. The platform reads tender documents, processes bids, evaluates eligibility, produces explainable evaluation reports, and ensures consistency and defensibility.
optimization_claims: Time saving: 38 minutes instead of three days for a tender
Consistent, documented, and defensible evaluation process
Improves over time with each tender cycle through model retraining
constraints_addressed: Language barriers: OCR and extraction pipeline handles multilingual documents
Field deployment: Offline PWA interface designed for unreliable connectivity
